$comment: Machine-readable install contract for autonomous agents. Human page: /agents.html
name: splice
summary: MCP server that gives coding agents a self-healing browser: page diagnosis, verified actions, token-efficient observation, and recovery memory.

requirements.network: required for clone and npm install only; runtime is local

steps.run: cd Splice && npm install && npm run build
claude mcp add splice -- node dist/cli.js start
steps.success_when: the MCP server 'splice' is listed by your client

alternatives.other_clients: node dist/cli.js init  # prints config snippets for Claude Desktop and Cursor

verify.notes: Exit only when this returns "healthy": true. Do not report success from build output alone.

on_failure: The doctor reports each failed check with a remedy. Fix the reported check and re-run the same command.

after_install.playbook: Read the built-in MCP resource 'splice://playbook' for the operating loop.
